title: ranunculus supernumerarius
intro: Ranunculus supernumerarius, also known as the extra-flowered buttercup, is a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus supernumerarius include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as tinctures, infusions, and salves, making it a versatile medicinal herb.
